/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/DiskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/BufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/BPlusTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/Catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/CatalogManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/Table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/src/Optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamic_persistence_test.dir/tests/DynamicPersistenceTest.cpp.o -o dynamic_persistence_test
